tests.name: Japan €60 vs €80
tests.winner: Inconclusive — do NOT call yet. €80 earns more per payer (ARPPU €65.6 vs €59.0, ARPU/matured €35.2 vs €31.9), but its earlier conversion edge has reversed (now 39.5% vs €60's 42.1%). The €80 arm is small (43 matured) and the read swings pull-to-pull. Add traffic to €80 to ~250 matured, then decide on ARPU/user.

tests.name: Romania free vs picker
tests.winner: Plan picker wins clearly and stably — D7 ROAS 0.64 vs 0.48 for free trial, CAC €44 vs €101 (under half), and ~2× revenue per user. Free trial is weakest on both. Inside the picker, monthly is picked more but yearly = 63% of revenue.

tests.name: Greece free vs picker
tests.winner: Plan picker wins. Its D7 ROAS (0.57) is stable, while free trial swings 0.48–0.59 pull-to-pull as day-7 annual charges and later refunds land (this read: 0.48). Picker also buys a payer for less than half the cost (CAC €57 vs €119) and gets 75% to pay on day 0. Yearly = 66% of picker revenue.

tests.name: Czechia paid trial €0.99
tests.winner: Read: 38 matured, 42% convert to annual. €0.99 trial paid at 91%, ARPU/matured €30.7. Still below the €3.99 Greece benchmark (57%) — the 4× lower barrier lets more in but fewer convert. Net winner needs Meta spend for ROAS.

tests.name: RO+MD paid trial €0.99
tests.winner: Read: 35 matured, ~29% convert to annual (dropped as the cohort matured). €0.99 trial paid at 85%, ARPU/matured €24.1, 10 of the cohort are Moldova. Weaker than Czechia and well below the €3.99 test (57%). Needs Meta spend for ROAS.

Romania free vs picker.note: ROAS D7 = net revenue within ~7 days of signup ÷ ad spend, run through the trial-end charge. Renewals not included.

rofree.flag: Actual Meta spend for 20–30 Jun (windowed export).

Japan €60 vs €80.note: Revenue D7 shown. Add Japan Meta spend (per arm, since 17 Jun) to compute ROAS.

Greece free vs picker.note: ROAS D7 through the trial-end charge. Two Greece campaigns: always-on free trial vs the plan-picker test.

grfree.flag: Actual Meta spend for 26 Jun–3 Jul (windowed export).

Czechia paid trial €0.99.note: Add Czechia Meta spend to compute ROAS.
